arts.ttl: Jack Grealish sends three-finger gesture to goading Aston Villa fans after miserable return
arts.sum: Grealish and Man City suffered their ninth defeat in 12 games as the English international was booed on his first start at Villa Park since leaving the club

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola refutes Erling Haaland claim after Man City loss to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Erling Haaland struggled once again against Aston Villa, with the Manchester City striker only scoring once in his last six matches - but his manager Pep Guardiola refused to let him take the blame

arts.ttl: Manchester City fans have plenty to say about Morgan Rogers after losing to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Manchester City have now lost nine of their last 12 games after being beaten 2-1 at Aston Villa in Saturday’s early Premier League kick-off. The...

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish bites back at Aston Villa jeers with defiant Man City gesture
arts.sum: It was an explosive homecoming for the ex-Villa hero as Pep Guardiola's flops crashed to yet another defeat

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains Morgan Rogers truth after Man City hurt by former player
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was asked about a youngster he used to have in Morgan Rogers

arts.ttl: Angry Jack Grealish snaps back at Aston Villa boo boys after nightmare return to Villa Park as relationship between former hometown hero and old side turns sour
arts.sum: The £100million Manchester City man left Villa in 2021 and was welcomed back to his old club with a chorus of boos every time he had a touch during City's limp 2-1 Premier League defeat.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola lifts lid on Morgan Rogers' Man City exit after youngster inspires Aston Villa victory
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has labelled Morgan Rogers an "exceptional player" after he played a key role in Aston Villa's win over Man City. He spent four years at the Etihad, but never made a first-team appearance under Guardiola, who was asked why Rogers was sold after full-time at Villa Park.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa linked with a swap deal involving 22-year-old attacker
arts.sum: Aston Villa winger Jaden Philogene has been linked with a move away from the club. According to journalist Alessandro Jacobone, AC Milan are keen on signing the 22-year-old winger and they are looking at him as a potential replacement for Samuel Chukwueze. The report mentions the possibility of a swap deal involving the two players […] The post Aston Villa linked with a swap deal involving 22-year-old attacker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why Kyle Walker replaced John Stones at half time for Man City at Aston Villa
arts.sum: John Stones made his return from injury as Manchester City took on Aston Villa in the Premier League, but only lasted 45 minutes.

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist blown away by 'absolutely magnificent' Aston Villa player as Guardiola gives 'so strong' verdict
